description: The catalog-service deployment in the catalog namespace is currently backed by a 1Gi legacy volume (catalog-data-legacy) mounted at /usr/share/nginx/html/data. Because the storage backend does not support in-place expansion, migrate the live database to a new 5Gi PersistentVolumeClaim named catalog-data-v2 in the catalog namespace. Reconfigure the catalog-service deployment to mount only the new catalog-data-v2 PVC at /usr/share/nginx/html/data, removing all references to the legacy volume, and ensure the deployment returns to a Running state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials: admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
